channel.title: Mind Control: Cults in 60 Seconds
channel.description: How cults recruit, manipulate, and control — every dangerous group in 60 seconds.
channel.itunes:author: Mind Control
channel.itunes:summary: How cults recruit, manipulate, and control — every dangerous group in 60 seconds.

item.title: Illyrian religion
item.description: Illyrian religion refers to the religious beliefs and practices of the Illyrian peoples, a group of tribes who spoke the Illyrian languages and inhabited part of the western Balkan Peninsula from at least the 8th century BC until the 7th century AD. The available written sources are very tenuous. They consist largely of personal and place names, and a few glosses from Classical sources. Still insu
